products.title: The Full Stack
products.shortDescription: Automation workflows plus AI agents. One complete system designed for today's operations and tomorrow's scale.
products.longDescription: The Full Stack combines our Automation Pro workflows with AI Agent deployment covering lead generation, client onboarding, CRM sync, invoicing, support tickets and reporting. One setup. Replaces a cabinet of disconnected SaaS tools.
bullets: The complete system automation today, AI agents tomorrow
Replaces over €4,400 a year of disconnected SaaS tools

products.title: Automation Pro
products.shortDescription: 12 production-ready workflows in a single deployment. Built with certified automation engineers.
products.longDescription: Automation Pro consolidates your operations: lead capture, CRM sync, email sequences, invoicing, reporting, onboarding and support at reliability levels informed by production environments rather than demo videos.
bullets: Replaces 12 manual processes and disconnected tools
Client results: 95% less manual data entry · 85% faster response time · 80% fewer errors

products.title: AI Agent Deploy
products.shortDescription: Custom AI agents. One deployment. Handles every repetitive task your team wastes hours on.
products.longDescription: AI Agent Deploy works on the intelligence layer conversational AI for support, lead qualification bots, document processing, smart scheduling and predictive analytics. Built around the latest AI models and deployed into your existing stack.
bullets: Handles every repetitive task your team does manually
AI-powered lead qualification, support and scheduling
Integrates with your existing CRM, email and tools

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.shortDescription: Dedicated n8n instance, SLA guarantee, and a dedicated automation engineer. Built for multi-location businesses and agencies scaling past 50 clients.
bullets: Dedicated n8n instance no shared infrastructure
Unlimited workflows build as you scale
Custom integrations any API, any system

addons.name: Extra Workflow
addons.description: Any single workflow added to your plan deployed in 48h.

addons.name: Quarterly Audit
addons.description: Full performance review + optimisation report every 90 days.

addons.name: Team Training
addons.description: 2-hour live session your team learns to monitor and expand the system.

addons.name: Zapier / Make Migration
addons.description: Full migration of your existing workflows to n8n faster, cheaper, more reliable.
